description: Normalize OSV /v1/query response into security-osv-vulns index. Owner: SCA pipeline.

script.description: Extract CVSS vector and type from severity array
script.source: if (ctx.severity != null && ctx.severity.length > 0) { ctx['vulnerability.cvss_vector'] = ctx.severity[0].score; ctx['vulnerability.cvss_type'] = ctx.severity[0].type; }

script.description: Extract CVE ID — first alias starting with CVE-
script.source: def a = ctx['vulnerability.aliases']; if (a != null) { for (def x : a) { if (x.startsWith('CVE-')) { ctx['vulnerability.cve_id'] = x; break; } } }

script.description: Flatten affected[] into deduplicated packages, purls, versions, fix versions
script.source: if (ctx.affected == null) return; Set pkgs = new HashSet(); Set purls = new HashSet(); Set vers = new HashSet(); List fixes = new ArrayList(); Set fixSet = new HashSet(); for (def aff : ctx.affected) { def pkg = aff.get('package'); if (pkg != null) { if (pkg.name != null) pkgs.add(pkg.name); if (pkg.purl != null) purls.add(pkg.purl); } if (aff.versions != null) { for (def v : aff.versions) vers.add(v); } if (aff.ranges != null) { for (def r : aff.ranges) { if (r.type == 'ECOSYSTEM' && r.events != null) { for (def e : r.events) { if (e.containsKey('fixed') && !fixSet.contains(e.fixed)) { fixes.add(e.fixed); fixSet.add(e.fixed); } } } } } } ctx['vulnerability.affected_packages'] = new ArrayList(pkgs); ctx['vulnerability.affected_purls'] = new ArrayList(purls); ctx['vulnerability.vulnerable_versions'] = new ArrayList(vers); ctx['vulnerability.fix_versions'] = fixes; if (fixes.size() > 0) ctx['vulnerability.fix_version'] = fixes[0];

script.description: Build purl_bases list — strip @version suffix for join key
script.source: def purls = ctx['vulnerability.affected_purls']; if (purls == null) return; List bases = new ArrayList(); for (def p : purls) { int at = p.indexOf('@'); bases.add(at > 0 ? p.substring(0, at) : p); } ctx['vulnerability.purl_bases'] = bases;

script.description: Extract advisory and fix reference URLs only
script.source: if (ctx.references == null) return; List adv = new ArrayList(); List fix = new ArrayList(); for (def r : ctx.references) { if ('ADVISORY'.equals(r.type)) adv.add(r.url); if ('FIX'.equals(r.type)) fix.add(r.url); } ctx['vulnerability.advisory_urls'] = adv; ctx['vulnerability.fix_urls'] = fix;
